name: @qulib/mcp
description: MCP server for Qulib — AI-callable release confidence. Seven tools: fused verdict, live-app scan, automation maturity, API coverage, test scaffold, and auth tools.
author: Tapesh Nagarwal

scripts.build: npm --prefix ../.. run build -w @qulib/core && tsc && chmod +x dist/index.js
scripts.test: node --import tsx/esm --test src/__tests__/summarize-analyze-result.test.ts src/__tests__/analyze-app-mcp-payload.test.ts src/__tests__/score-confidence-mcp.test.ts src/__tests__/score-provenance-mcp.test.ts src/__tests__/naming-aliases.test.ts src/__tests__/diff.test.ts src/__tests__/rate-limit.test.ts src/__tests__/entitlements.test.ts
